propositions: CLAUDE.local.md mixes machine/operator-local content with generally-applicable project rules duplicated from CLAUDE.md.
The file should be stripped to only machine/operator-local content: the main-tracking LaunchAgent note and Gerrit auth identities/credential-pinning guidance.
Removal depends on every generally-applicable rule already having a home in AGENTS.md or docs/ so no guidance is lost.
A decision on modernizing the CLAUDE.local.md name versus importing a gitignored file via @ should be recorded.
